heading: Advances in foreign countries
label: 2076 Advances in foreign countries
text: Section 3648 of the Revised Statutes () shall not apply to payments made for the Bureau of Customs in foreign countries.31 U.S.C. 529b12See References in Text note below.1See Change of Name note below.2
notes: References in TextSection 3648 of the Revised Statutes, referred to in text, was classified to section 529 (not 529b) of former Title 31, Money and Finance, and subsequently repealed and restated as section 3324(a), (b) of Title 31 by , §§ 1, 5(b), , , 1068.Pub. L. 97–25896 Stat. 950Sept. 13, 1982

CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to the general revision and enactment of Title 31, Money and Finance, by , , .section 529b of Title 31Pub. L. 97–258, § 196 Stat. 877Sept. 13, 1982

Transfer of FunctionsFor transfer of functions, personnel, assets, and liabilities of the United States Customs Service of the Department of the Treasury, including functions of the Secretary of the Treasury relating thereto, to the Secretary of Homeland Security, and for treatment of related references, see sections 203(1), 551(d), 552(d), and 557 of Title 6, Domestic Security, and the Department of Homeland Security Reorganization Plan of , as modified, set out as a note under . For establishment of U.S. Customs and Border Protection in the Department of Homeland Security, treated as if included in as of , see , as amended generally by , and , set out as a note under .November 25, 2002Nov. 25, 2002section 542 of Title 6Pub. Similar ProvisionsSection is from Treasury Department Appropriation Act, 1939. Similar provisions were contained in the following appropriation acts:, title I, § 1, .May 6, 1939, ch. 11553 Stat. 660, title I, .May 14, 1937, ch. 18050 Stat. 142, .June 23, 1936, ch. 72549 Stat. 1832, .May 14, 1935, ch. 11049 Stat. 222

Change of NameThe Bureau of Customs was redesignated the United States Customs Service by Treasury Department Order 165–23, , eff. , 38 F.R. 13037. See, also, , Money and Finance.Apr. 4, 1973Aug. 1, 1973section 308 of Title 31

Transfer of FunctionsFor transfer of functions of other officers, employees, and agencies of Department of the Treasury, with certain exceptions, to Secretary of the Treasury, with power to delegate, see Reorg. Plan No. 26 of 1950, §§ 1, 2, eff. , 15 F.R. 4935, , 1281, set out in the Appendix to Title 5, Government Organization and Employees.July 31, 195064 Stat. 1280
